name: Advance America
description_short: Humble, TX Advance America at 113-A 1st St W offers payday and title loans with fast approval and transparent terms.
description_long:
Advance America in Humble, TX is located at 113-A 1st St W, a standalone storefront serving the local community. The branch operates Monday through Friday from 10AM to 6PM, with Saturday hours from 10AM to 3PM. Sunday closures mean you'll want to plan ahead for weekend borrowing needs in Humble.

This Humble location provides payday loans, title loans, and other short-term credit solutions for residents facing cash flow gaps. Call +1 281-446-1811 to speak with a loan specialist about your eligibility, rates, and application timeline. Staff can answer questions about documentation requirements and help you understand the full terms of your loan.

Residents of Humble often visit this branch when facing unexpected expenses before payday. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a valid checking account to speed up the application process. Same-day funding is available for approved borrowers, making this a practical solution for immediate financial needs.
pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Title loans offer significantly larger amounts ($2,000-$25,000) for vehicle owners
Multiple application channels: online, in-store, and phone pre-qualification available
Extended store hours including Saturday access (9am-4pm) and Friday evening hours
High customer satisfaction rating of 4.9/5 stars based on 125,595 reviews
Additional money services including Western Union transfers
cons: APR and fee information not disclosed on website; typical payday loans carry 300%+ APR
Title loans require vehicle ownership and title transfer, creating repossession risk if payments missed
Installment loan maximum of $1,000 is modest for most financial emergencies
Short payday loan terms (2-4 weeks) create tight repayment pressure for cash-strapped borrowers
No mention of alternatives, financial counseling, or debt management resources
best_for: Workers with occasional cash flow gaps between paychecks needing $200-$500 quickly
Vehicle owners needing $2,000-$10,000 for genuine emergencies with car title equity
Bilingual Spanish-speaking borrowers in the Jacksonville area seeking in-person service
Consumers who cannot access traditional bank loans due to credit or employment circumstances
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed individuals facing genuine short-term cash emergencies (medical, utilities, auto repair) who cannot access bank loans and have reliable repayment capacity within 2-4 weeks, or vehicle owners with car equity seeking larger emergency amounts. The critical caveat is that payday and title loans are high-cost products; borrowers must understand and compare APRs/fees, avoid repeat borrowing cycles, and consider alternatives like credit union PALs, employer advances, or negotiating with creditors before committing.
services: Payday loans: $100-$500, 2-4 week terms (online or in-store)
Installment loans: $100-$1,000 with multiple payment terms (online or in-store)
Title loans: $2,000-$25,000 using vehicle collateral (online application)
Store locator service across multiple states

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 113-A 1st St W, Humble, TX. Fast payday and title loans with same-day approval.
